APP.TITLE: Namespoter
APP.LOGIN_REQUIRED: Please log in to start searching for your domain names.

PROJECTS.TITLE: My Projects
PROJECTS.SUBTITLE: Resume your searches where you left off.

STEP1.TITLE: Your Project
STEP1.SUBTITLE: Describe your solution, your target, and your values.
STEP1.PLACEHOLDER: E.g.: A platform for local and eco-responsible flower delivery...

STEP2.TITLE: Configuration
STEP2.SUBTITLE: Adjust your keywords and choose extensions to check.

STEP3.TITLE: Available {{extensions}} domains
STEP3.SUBTITLE: Here are our suggestions for your project.
STEP3.NOTE: Note: We analyzed {{total}} name ideas, but only {{count}} were actually available in .com.
